title: SMA-1: Structure-Mapping Agentic Memory
description: A retrieval memory that grounds a generalist LLM in a curated, expert-maintained domain ontology, using structure-mapping analogical retrieval to turn it into a verifiable specialist. SMA beats vector RAG and knowledge graphs on rare/cross-vocabulary/high-stakes reasoning, providing provenance, abstention, and novelty detection that traditional RAG cannot offer. Demonstrated on five domains (medicine, genomics, finance, cyber, legal) with trustworthy-AI metrics.
